sentences.target: Mon grand-père est aveugle depuis dix ans.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ ɛ avœɡl dəpɥi diz‿ɑ̃/

translations.fr: Mon grand-père est aveugle depuis dix ans.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃ pɛʁ ɛ avœɡl dəpɥi diz‿ɑ̃/
translations.en: My grandfather has been blind for ten years.
translations.es: Mi abuelo es ciego desde hace diez años.
translations.de: Mein Großvater ist seit zehn Jahren blind.
translations.it: Mio nonno è cieco da dieci anni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我爷爷失明已经十年了。
translations.yue: 我爺爺已經失明咗十年。
translations.ru: Мой дедушка слеп уже десять лет.
translations.pt: Meu avô está cego há dez anos.
translations.vi: Ông tôi bị mù đã mười năm.
translations.nl: Mijn grootvader is al tien jaar blind.
translations.uk: Мій дідусь сліпий уже десять років.
translations.hi: मेरे दादा दस साल से अंधे हैं.
translations.pl: Mój dziadek jest niewidomy od dziesięciu lat.
translations.el: Ο παππούς μου είναι τυφλός εδώ και δέκα χρόνια.
translations.nb: Bestefaren min har vært blind i ti år.
translations.id: Kakek saya sudah buta selama sepuluh tahun.
translations.sv: Min farfar har varit blind i tio år.
translations.ro: Bunicul meu este orb de zece ani.
translations.cs: Můj dědeček je slepý už deset let.
translations.da: Min bedstefar har været blind i ti år.
translations.fi: Isoisäni on ollut sokea kymmenen vuotta.
translations.ja: 祖父はもう10年間目が見えません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agreeing in gender/number with the noun 'grand-père' (masculine singular).
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective describing the subject; masculine singular agreement.
Preposition introducing a duration/time span with present tense ('for/since').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'ans'.
Common noun (plural) serving as the complement of 'depuis'.

translations.ko: 조심하세요, 그 개는 앞을 못 봐요.
translations.vi: Cẩn thận, con chó bị mù.
translations.nl: Pas op, de hond is blind.
translations.ja: 気をつけて、その犬は目が見えません。

tokens.explanation: Interjection used as a warning ('Watch out').
Definite article (masculine singular) introducing a specific noun.
Common noun (masculine singular); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present).
Predicate adjective describing 'le chien'.

sentences.target: Je veux aider un voisin aveugle.

translations.fr: Je veux aider un voisin aveugle.
translations.en: I want to help a blind neighbor.
translations.es: Quiero ayudar a un vecino ciego.
translations.de: Ich möchte einem blinden Nachbarn helfen.
translations.ko: 앞을 못 보는 이웃을 돕고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想帮助一位看不见的邻居。
translations.yue: 我想幫一位睇唔到嘅鄰居。
translations.tr: Kör bir komşuya yardım etmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn giúp một người hàng xóm bị mù.
translations.nl: Ik wil een blinde buur helpen.
translations.hi: मैं एक अंधे पड़ोसी की मदद करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να βοηθήσω έναν τυφλό γείτονα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil hjelpe en blind nabo.
translations.id: Saya ingin membantu seorang tetangga tunanetra.
translations.sv: Jag vill hjälpa en blind granne.
translations.ro: Vreau să ajut un vecin orb.
translations.da: Jeg vil hjælpe en blind nabo.
translations.ja: 目の見えない近所の人を助けたいです.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Main verb (present, 1st person singular) selecting an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veux'.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) introducing a non-specific noun.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'aider'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'voisin' (masculine singular).

sentences.target: Elle guide son frère aveugle à la porte.
sentences.reading: /ɛl ɡid sɔ̃ fʁɛʁ avœɡl a la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Elle guide son frère aveugle à la porte.
translations.ipa: /ɛl ɡid sɔ̃ fʁɛʁ avœɡl a la pɔʁt/
translations.en: She guides her blind brother to the door.
translations.es: Ella guía a su hermano ciego hasta la puerta.
translations.de: Sie führt ihren blinden Bruder zur Tür.
translations.it: Lei accompagna suo fratello cieco alla porta.
translations.ko: 그녀는 앞을 못 보는 남동생을 문까지 안내해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她领着失明的兄弟到门口。
translations.yue: 佢帶住佢失明嘅兄弟去到門口。
translations.ru: Она ведёт своего слепого брата к двери.
translations.pt: Ela guia o irmão cego até a porta.
translations.he: היא מובילה את אחיה העיוור אל הדלת.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dẫn người anh trai bị mù đến cửa.
translations.ar: إنها تقود أخاها الكفيف إلى الباب.
translations.nl: Ze begeleidt haar blinde broer naar de deur.
translations.uk: Вона веде свого сліпого брата до дверей.
translations.hi: वह अपने अंधे भाई को दरवाजे तक ले जाती है.
translations.pl: Ona prowadzi swojego niewidomego brata do drzwi.
translations.el: Οδηγεί τον τυφλό αδελφό της στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Hun leder sin blinde bror til døren.
translations.id: Dia menuntun saudara laki-lakinya yang tunanetra ke pintu.
translations.sv: Hon leder sin blinde bror till dörren.
translations.ro: Ea își conduce fratele orb până la ușă.
translations.cs: Vede svého slepého bratra ke dveřím.
translations.da: Hun fører sin blinde bror hen til døren.
translations.ja: 彼女は目の見えない兄をドアまで案内します.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (3rd person feminine singular).
Main verb (present, 3rd person singular); transitive.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agreeing with 'frère' (masculine singular).
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'guide'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'frère' (masculine singular).
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of destination.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'porte'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'à'.
